hero.tagline: The Paradise on Earth serves soul-warming flavours — from Wazwan feasts to Kahwa on a Shikara.
highlights: 11 curated food spots across Kashmir's iconic landmarks
Authentic Kashmiri Wazwan, Dum Aloo & Kahwa near Dal Lake & Lal Chowk
From floating snack boats on Dal Lake to cozy dhabas in Sonmarg snow

foodSpots.dishName: Dum Aloo, Wazwan Paneer (Waza Paneer), Kashmiri Naan, Plain Roti, Nadru (Lotus Stem – seasonal), Dry Vegetable Chutney
foodSpots.description: One of the most famous places to experience authentic Kashmiri cuisine in Srinagar, Mughal Darbar is a must-visit for tourists exploring Lal Chowk. Known for its rich and spicy Dum Aloo and flavorful Wazwan Paneer, this place offers a true taste of traditional Kashmiri food. The unique Kashmiri Naan topped with cream and dry fruits adds a sweet twist to your food journey. If you're searching for the best food to try in Srinagar or top tourist food spots near Lal Chowk, this iconic restaurant should be on your list for an unforgettable local dining experience.
foodSpots.tips: Visit during lunch hours for the freshest preparations and ask locals for directions—everyone knows this place.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Lal Chowk, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India
foodSpots.routeDetails: Easily reachable by walking or local transport from anywhere in Srinagar city center.

foodSpots.description: A perfect roadside stop for travelers heading to Sonmarg, Raja Dhaba offers hot Maggi, crispy pakodas, and steaming tea with breathtaking mountain views. While the food is simple, the experience of eating in the snowy landscape makes it one of the best tourist food stops near Sonmarg. Ideal for those searching for must-try food experiences in Kashmir, this spot combines scenic beauty with quick bites.
foodSpots.tips: Stop here early during your journey to enjoy fresh hot snacks before the rush of tourists.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Sonmarg Road, near scenic view point, Jammu & Kashmir, India
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located on the way to Sonmarg; easily accessible via cab or private vehicle on highway.

foodSpots.description: Located near the snow activity zone in Sonmarg, Wani Restaurant is a popular stop for tourists looking to enjoy Maggi and tea in freezing temperatures. The charm lies in enjoying hot food amidst snow-covered landscapes, making it one of the top food experiences in Sonmarg. If you're exploring the best tourist places in Kashmir, this spot offers a cozy break during your adventure.
foodSpots.tips: Eat Maggi immediately after serving—food gets cold very quickly in snowy weather.
foodSpots.routeDetails: Reachable by walking from snow activity points or via local taxis.

foodSpots.dishName: Kashmiri Kahwa, Bread Toast, Jam, Puri Bhaji, Fruits (Apple, Orange)
foodSpots.description: Enjoy a traditional Kashmiri breakfast experience on a houseboat at Nigeen Lake, one of the most peaceful tourist locations in Srinagar. From authentic Kashmiri Kahwa to homestyle Puri Bhaji and fresh fruits, this experience combines food with culture and scenic beauty. Perfect for travelers looking for unique food experiences in Kashmir and best places to stay and eat in Srinagar.
foodSpots.tips: Request homemade breakfast options in advance to enjoy authentic local flavors during your stay.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Nigeen Lake, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India
foodSpots.routeDetails: Reachable via Shikara ride from lake entry points.

foodSpots.description: One of the most fun food experiences in Srinagar is enjoying Maggi on a Shikara ride in Dal Lake. This floating snack boat serves hot Maggi, Kahwa, and light snacks, making it a favorite among tourists. If you're searching for unique places to eat in Kashmir or best food during Dal Lake boating, this experience perfectly blends adventure with comfort food.
foodSpots.tips: Try Maggi with chips for a unique combo and eat quickly before it gets cold on the lake.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Dal Lake, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India (Floating Vendor near market)
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located within floating market area; accessible via Shikara.

foodSpots.dishName: Wazwan Thali (Rogan Josh, Rista, Gushtaba, Kebabs, Methi Maaz, Rice)
foodSpots.description: JJ Foods offers a complete authentic Kashmiri Wazwan experience, which is one of the top food experiences in Srinagar. This multi-course traditional feast includes iconic dishes like Rogan Josh, Rista, and Gushtaba cooked with aromatic spices like saffron, cinnamon, and cardamom. If you are searching for the best traditional food in Kashmir or top tourist dining experiences in Srinagar, this place is perfect to explore the rich cultural cuisine of Kashmir.
foodSpots.tips: Visit with a group to enjoy the full Wazwan experience as it includes multiple dishes served together.
foodSpots.routeDetails: Easily reachable via local taxi or cab in Srinagar.

foodSpots.dishName: Chicken Roll, Chicken Burger, Coconut Cookie, Kashmiri Naan, Bakery Snacks & Pastries
foodSpots.description: Janta Bakery is a popular bakery in Srinagar known for its delicious snacks, burgers, rolls, and cookies. From crispy chicken rolls to cheesy burgers and unique coconut cookies, this place is ideal for tourists looking for quick bites in Srinagar. A must-visit for those searching for best bakeries in Kashmir or affordable food near tourist places in Srinagar.
foodSpots.tips: Try their coconut cookies with tea—they are one of the most loved bakery items here.
foodSpots.routeDetails: Easily accessible by walking in local market area.

foodSpots.description: A famous street food spot near Hazratbal Dargah, Baba Sweets serves traditional Halwa Paratha which is loved by locals and tourists alike. This combination of sweet suji halwa and crispy paratha is a must-try food in Srinagar. Ideal for travelers exploring top tourist places in Kashmir and looking for authentic street food near Hazratbal.
foodSpots.tips: Visit during morning or evening for freshly prepared halwa and paratha.
foodSpots.routeDetails: Walking distance from Hazratbal shrine area.

foodSpots.dishName: Kashmiri Kahwa, Snacks (Chips, Biscuits, Cold Drinks)
foodSpots.description: Enjoy Kashmiri Kahwa at Char Chinar Island, one of the most scenic tourist places in Srinagar. This experience combines nature, peaceful surroundings, and traditional Kashmiri drinks, making it a must-do activity for tourists visiting Dal Lake.
foodSpots.tips: Carry some cash as digital payments may not work on the island.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Char Chinar, Dal Lake, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India
foodSpots.routeDetails: Reachable via Shikara ride from Dal Lake.

foodSpots.description: Moonlight is known for its delicious walnut fudge made with dry fruits like walnuts and dates. This is one of the best sweets to try in Kashmir and a great option for souvenirs. Ideal for tourists searching for famous sweets in Srinagar.
foodSpots.tips: Buy packed boxes for travel—they make great gifts from Kashmir.

foodSpots.dishName: Pani Puri, Rajma Chawal, Chaat, North Indian & Chinese Food
foodSpots.description: Nathu's Sweets is a popular restaurant offering a wide variety of North Indian food, chaat, and desserts near Dal Lake. From spicy pani puri to comforting rajma chawal, this place is perfect for tourists looking for affordable vegetarian food in Srinagar near major tourist spots.
foodSpots.tips: Ideal for families looking for hygienic and budget-friendly meals near Dal Lake.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Near Dal Lake, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located opposite a ghat near Dal Lake; easy to reach by walking.
